title: Jung's Mons
description: Cobblemon Addon that adds skins for popular games such as Overwatch, Valorant & League of Legends!
body:
Made a pack for Cobblemon that adds different skins, all based on popular games such as Overwatch, Valorant & League of Legends! Check out below to see what's included in this pack.

# UPDATE 2.1.0 IS OUT!
Added in this update are 5 brand new skins, and the introduction of skins based on Valorant characters. Also, all skins now have a standardized item to interact with based on the franchise.

## List of all the skins:
### Overwatch skins (right-click with gold chestplate):
- Pikachu as Tracer
- Watchog as Soldier 76
- Mismagius as Moira
- Gardevoir as Mercy
- Emboar as Roadhog
- Alakazam as Zenyatta 
- Iron Moth as Lifeweaver

### Valorant skins (right-click with iron chestplate):
- Psyduck as Gekko's Wingman 
- Minun as Neon 

### League of Legends skins (right-click with leather chestplate):
- Charcadet as Isha from Arcane
- Zoroark as Warwick
- Armarouge as Vi or Jinx (interact with leather chestplate or leggings)
- Ceruledge as Vi or Jinx (interact with leather chestplate or leggings)
- Plusle as Zeri
- Meowth as Yuumi (NEWLY ADDED + ALOLAN FORM as BATTLE PRINCIPLE YUUMI!)

* Additionally, Iron Moth by https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/odysseymons has also been included in this pack, credit goes to BifeSalgado & aki4hiro. Please remove any existing Iron Moth asset from other packs/mods for the Lifeweaver skin to function properly.

* This pack does not include spawn pools.
